judgment.summary: Zscaler offers strong revenue growth and healthy free cash flow despite currently negative operating and profit margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS 1.01 beat the 0.90 estimate; next earnings date is 2026-05-26.
positives: Free cash flow (TTM) $1.02B — healthy cash generation.
Total cash $3.51B vs $1.87B debt — strong liquidity position.
negatives: Profit margin -2.3% — company is not yet net income positive.
Price/Book 12.77 — high valuation relative to book value.

news.paragraph: Zscaler is seeing positive momentum following an upgrade by B. Riley to a Buy rating with a $225 price target. The stock has also been highlighted as an insider-favored growth name and appeared among midday gainers. While no specific earnings or regulatory catalysts are mentioned in the recent headlines, the recent analyst upgrades and price rebound are key factors for traders to monitor.
